title: Formal model with contradictory axioms
description: Formal specification contains mutually contradictory axioms

mutation.description: Add contradictory axioms to formal model

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect contradictory axioms in formal model

title: Model checking with state space explosion
description: Formal model has exponential state space causing timeout

mutation.description: Add variables causing state space explosion

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect state space explosion in model checking

title: Formal invariant that is too weak
description: Invariant allows undesirable behaviors that should be forbidden

mutation.description: Weaken invariant to allow bad states

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect overly weak formal invariant

title: Cross-formal model inconsistency
description: Different formal models (TLA+, Alloy) specify conflicting behaviors

mutation.description: Make Alloy model contradict TLA+ specification

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect cross-formal model inconsistencies

title: Formal model with undefined behavior
description: Model contains operations with undefined semantics

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect undefined behavior in formal model
